reason: Quality check must verify asset data survives source→upload→snapshot→download→cache→display round trip.
Quality check must confirm traversal/cache/auth helpers are shared with existing creative sync patterns where possible.
Backend checks must cover owner scope, nonce, size/mime validation, dedupe, refs, and GC policy.
Frontend checks must cover Opentu cache URL discovery, upload rewrite, hydration, and conflict behavior.
Review must compare implementation against the inspected current code paths and confirmed gaps.
Review must ensure this child closes item 5 without regressing Sprint1 fixes or masking remaining parent gates.
Check must verify implementation closes the layered planning findings and does not regress patched safety contracts.
Check must verify Opentu OpenSpec gate was completed or explicitly excepted before Opentu code changes.
Check must enforce Opentu repository instructions for any sibling repo edits.
Check must enforce or verify explicit exception for OpenSpec approval requirements.
Check must compare implemented capability against OpenSpec project context when proposal exists.
Check must verify S3-compatible production adapter, DB fallback restrictions, fail-closed rollout config, and no bucket URL/credential exposure.
Check must verify DB-backed asset storage is canary-limited on VPS-A and has disk-headroom guards, or that production is upgraded to object storage.
Check must verify implementation follows the VPS re-plan dynamic workflow result and patched production-safe storage scope.
Check must verify Opentu implementation matches the approved OpenSpec proposal scope and external new-api asset gateway contract.
Check must verify implementation follows the OpenSpec design decisions for pure outbound rewrite, hydration, sanitizer, service-worker pass-through, and rollback.
Check must verify every creative-cloud-asset-sync OpenSpec requirement and scenario is covered by tests or explicit evidence.
Check must verify provider-neutral S3 config follows the provider precheck: no hard-coded R2 dependency, no secrets, private bucket semantics, and production fail-closed behavior.
Check must compare backend behavior against the durable creative asset sync API/storage/validation contract.
Check must compare frontend behavior against the durable Opentu asset prepare/hydrate/sanitizer/SW contract.
